title: EXOTIC-CCR A001: Poisson/Weyl lifts of the Alpöge–Fable Keller map with dual-transport deficiency (∞,∞)
description:
EXOTIC-CCR v0.3.2 — Daniel Eric Fredriksen (Quantyra Inc).

Claim: H=−iX₁ on C_c^∞(R³) has deficiency indices (n₊,n₋)=(∞,∞) via whole maximal-orbit deficiency vectors (transverse cutoffs only). Infinitely many self-adjoint extensions; algebraic CCR/Poisson data select none.

Errata: v0.2.2 pair (0,∞) withdrawn; v0.3.0 interior s-indicator proof withdrawn (not in Dom(H*)).

Non-claims: No gate/channel/advantage; seed F attributed to Alpöge–Fable (restated).

Paper: docs/notes/A001-arxiv.pdf
